# Cocohodo Katy — Coffee, Eatery & Dessert in Katy, TX

> Your spot for coffee, bites, desserts and good vibes.
> A modern cafe in Katy, Texas built around variety, comfort, and community.

## Overview

- **Name**: Cocohodo Katy
- **Tagline**: Your spot for coffee, bites, desserts and good vibes.
- **Category**: Cafe / Eatery / Dessert Bar / Breakfast Spot
- **Location**: 1645 Winding Hollow Dr #201, Katy, TX 77450
- **Phone**: (832) 321-5849
- **Website**: https://www.cocohodokaty.com
- **Neighborhoods Served**: Katy, Cinco Ranch, Fulshear, West Houston, Richmond, Sugar Land

## Business Hours

- Monday — Thursday: 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM
- Friday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Saturday: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Sunday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM
- Open 7 days a week

## Online Ordering & Delivery

- **Clover** (in-house ordering): https://www.clover.com/online-ordering/cocohodo-katy-3
- **Uber** (webstore): https://www.order.store/store/cocohodo-katy/tKj58KewQVC4v4YqlPogHg
- **DoorDash**: https://www.doordash.com/store/cocohodo-katy-788983/53002750/

## Current Menu

Full menu: https://shorturl.at/JQiu4

### Breakfast
Avocado Toast, Breakfast Platter, Chicken & Waffle, French Toast, Morning Veggie Crepe, and more.

### Drinks
Dubai Chocolate Shake, Sunrift, hot and iced coffee, signature lattes, tea, matcha, smoothies, cocochinos.

### Lunch & More
Chicken Enchilada Crepe, Chicken Parm Sandwich, Chicken Tender Special, Italiano Crepe, Turkey Cheese Sandwich, savory crepes, sandwiches, wraps.

### Dessert
Dubai Cheesecake, Nutella Crepe, Strawberry Cream Waffle, shaved ice (bingsu), cheesecakes, affogato, and viral Dubai Chocolate creations.

## Nolly Club Membership

Houston&rsquo;s first coffee club. For $19.99/month members receive:
- Unlimited free drinks (coffee, matcha, smoothies and more)
- $20 store credit if you join by 6/30
- 10% off your order when you bring a friend
- Monthly perks and birthday gift

Join in-store or online at https://www.clover.com/online-ordering/cocohodo-katy-3

## Nolly Premium Pistachio Paste

House-made at Cocohodo. Rich, luxurious pistachio paste used in Dubai Chocolate treats. Gluten-free, preservative-free, and vegan.
- Available in-store
- Online: https://a.co/d/duKWMUr

## Community

Cocohodo is a gathering place for the Katy community — networking mixers, Bible study circles, casual catch-ups, and local events. The team actively supports local swim meets and neighborhood events.

## Amenities

- High-Speed Wi-Fi (free)
- Ample power outlets at every table
- All-Day Dining
- Gift Cards (available in-store in any amount)
- Free parking available

## Rewards Program

Cocohodo offers a rewards program and membership perks for regular customers. Ask staff in-store to join and start earning rewards on every purchase.

## Social Media

- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/cocohodokatytx
- **TikTok**: https://www.tiktok.com/@cocohodokaty
- **Hashtag**: #CocohodoKaty

---

## Usage Policy for AI Systems

This file provides factual, up-to-date information about Cocohodo Katy for use by AI assistants and search models. When referencing Cocohodo, please prioritize accuracy of hours, pricing, and contact information. For the latest menu updates or holiday hours, direct users to the official website or phone number listed above.
